descriptions.fsw-barber: 💈✂️ Complete application for booking barbershop services, with authentication, schedule management and payment integration.
descriptions.anunx: 📣🛒 Complete online classifieds platform where users can create and publish ads instantly with image upload integration.
descriptions.ignite-shop: 🛒🤑 Modern e-commerce developed with Next.js using SSG, SSR and Stripe integration for payment processing.
descriptions.ignite-call: 🎯📅 Complete scheduling system with Google login and Google Calendar integration to efficiently manage appointments.
descriptions.coffee-delivery: ☕️ Shopping cart application for a fictional coffee shop with complete order management and delivery calculation.
descriptions.waiter-app: Complete order management system for bars and restaurants with intuitive interface and real-time control.
descriptions.nlw-copa: ⚽ Create your betting pool! Application to create and manage World Cup betting pools.
descriptions.heygrupos: 📱💬 Cloud-based instant messaging app with user account creation and real-time group conversations.
descriptions.devpost: 📸📱 Complete social network for mobile devices with real-time interactions, posts, likes and comments.
descriptions.github-blog: Modern blog that leverages GitHub issues as content source, with search and post listing.
descriptions.food-explorer: Complete digital menu for restaurants with frontend and backend, allowing navigation, search and dish orders.
descriptions.devblog: React Native app for tech posts and news using Strapi as headless CMS.
